tests.name: test_pa13_settings_doctype_exists
tests.description: PA-13: 'Prisma AI Settings' doctype is reachable via REST API.

tests.name: test_pa14_settings_has_provider_field
tests.description: PA-14: Settings document has a provider/model configuration field.

tests.name: test_pa15_settings_api_key_not_exposed
tests.description: PA-15: REST GET on Settings does NOT expose plaintext API key.

tests.name: test_pa16_desk_widget_asset_served
tests.description: PA-16: desk_widget.js asset is served at /assets/prisma_assistant/js/desk_widget.js.

tests.name: test_pa10_key_info_has_status_field
tests.description: PA-10: Response contains a 'status' field indicating key presence.

tests.name: test_pa11_key_is_masked
tests.description: PA-11: get_api_key_info does NOT return the full API key.

tests.name: test_pa12_reveal_requires_system_manager
tests.description: PA-12: reveal_api_key requires System Manager role (or returns safely).

tests.name: test_pa01_valid_message_returns_200
tests.description: PA-01: send_message with valid text → HTTP 200.

tests.name: test_pa02_response_has_required_fields
tests.description: PA-02: Response body contains 'message' key with a string value.

tests.name: test_pa03_empty_message_handled_gracefully
tests.description: PA-03: Empty message string → error or empty response (no 500).

tests.name: test_pa04_empty_history_accepted
tests.description: PA-04: Explicitly empty history=[] is accepted.

tests.name: test_pa05_history_passed_correctly
tests.description: PA-05: Non-empty history list is accepted and included in context.

tests.name: test_pa06_files_empty_list_accepted
tests.description: PA-06: files=[] is accepted without error.

tests.name: test_pa07_response_time_measured
tests.description: PA-07: send_message completes within AI_TIMEOUT seconds.

tests.name: test_pa08_large_message_handled
tests.description: PA-08: Message with 2000 characters is accepted (no truncation error).
